name: deterministic-esp-async-webserver-tooling
description: Dev/CI tooling manifest for DeterministicESPAsyncWebServer. This is NOT a publishable npm package and the library has no runtime npm dependencies (it is C++/PlatformIO and pulls lwIP/mbedTLS from the framework). The manifest exists so GitHub's dependency graph and Dependabot can track and update the Node-based formatting and spelling tools the repo runs in CI.
